g.onclick: sendPrompt('What security controls exist on the user device?')
sendPrompt('How does a firewall protect the network?')
sendPrompt('What is NAT and how does a router use it?')
sendPrompt('What role does the ISP play in a network request?')
sendPrompt('What happens to packets as they traverse the internet?')
sendPrompt('What happens on the web server when a request arrives?')
sendPrompt('Where does authentication happen in a web request?')
